name: File Search
description: Finds files matching a pattern across common directories
author: AgentOS

steps.description: Search for files by pattern in home directory
steps.command: Get-ChildItem -Path $env:USERPROFILE -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter '*.pdf' | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 | Format-Table -AutoSize
